corrections.text: The article attributes to AllSci the mechanism description: Decnupaz 'delivers an indolinobenzodiazepine pseudodimer payload that alkylates DNA, causing single-strand breaks without crosslinking and triggering apoptosis.' The AllSci source was inaccessible (HTTP 403) at review time and could not be snapshot-verified. The substance of the claim (single-strand DNA breaks, apoptosis) is corroborated by the PR Newswire source, but the specific chemical class name 'indolinobenzodiazepine pseudodimer' cannot be independently confirmed from available snapshots.

The article states that AbbVie acquired ImmunoGen 'in November 2023 for $10.1 billion' citing AllSci. The AllSci source was inaccessible (HTTP 403) at review time. This figure is consistent with widely reported public records of the acquisition but could not be verified from the available source snapshots.
